category_sources: Official homepage describes Singular as a computer algebra system for polynomial computations, algebraic geometry, and singularity theory.
source_facts.description says it is a computer algebra system for polynomial computations.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses CAS Singular.
Official homepage title and navigation use Singular.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README lists the Developer and Reference Manual at https://www.singular.uni-kl.de/dox/html.
Official GitHub README lists the User Manual at https://www.singular.uni-kl.de/Manual/latest.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README lists https://github.com/Singular/Singular as the source code git repository.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists algebraic geometry, singularity theory, and advanced algorithms.
